debug.bundleDescription: Generar a ZIP containing recent logs for support and troubleshooting
debug.generateBuffNameDescription: Generar or update per-locale runtime parser/BuffName.json files in AppDatos from src/lib/config/BuffName.json.
debug.generateBuffNameSearchDescription: Generar or update per-locale runtime search/BuffNameSearch.json files in AppDatos from src/lib/config/BuffName.json.
debug.generateInfoBody:
Using parser/skillnames.json as the example:

When you click Generar Skill Traduccións, it now does the following:

• reads the existing runtime locale files in AppDatos
• rebuilds parser/skillnames.json from the source tables
• adds new IDs found in the source JSON files
• preserves existing non-zh-CN translations for each locale
• preserves existing entries that only exist in your runtime files
• writes the merged result back to locales/<locale>/parser/skillnames.json

The current generator is source-based and pulls from these, in this priority order:

1. RecountTable.json
2. DamageAttrIdName.json
3. SkillEffectTable.json
4. SkillFightLevelTable.json
5. TempAttrTable.json

What is preserved:

• existing non-zh-CN translations
• existing runtime-only entries
• existing extra fields on preserved entries

What is regenerated:

• zh-CN name values from the source tables
• zh-CN note values from the source tables when available

So the accurate behavior is:

• New IDs from the source files: yes, they get added
• Your custom non-zh-CN translations: yes, they are preserved
• Your runtime-only entries: yes, they remain in place
• Your manual zh-CN name edits: no, those can still be overwritten by the generator
• Your manual zh-CN note edits: no, those can still be overwritten when the source provides a note
debug.generateInfoTitle: ¿Qué sucede cuando haces clic en Generar?
debug.generateMonsterNameDescription: Generar or update per-locale runtime parser/MonsterName.json files in AppDatos from src-tauri/meter-data/MonsterIdNameType.json.
debug.generateSceneNameDescription: Generar or update per-locale runtime parser/SceneName.json files in AppDatos from src-tauri/meter-data/SceneName.json.
debug.generateSkillNamesDescription: Generar or update per-locale runtime parser/skillnames.json files in AppDatos from RecountTable.json, DamageAttrIdName.json, SkillEffectTable.json, SkillFightLevelTable.json, and TempAttrTable.json.

debug.translationSourceModeDescription: Switch between the app's built-in translations and the editable translation files stored in AppDatos.

dps.live.relativeToTopDPSPlayerDescripti: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
dps.live.relativeToTopDPSSkillDescriptio: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

没有可添加到优先级的 Buff

可创建多个文本监控区；同一个 Buff 或计数器在所有监控区内全局唯一。
该监控区中的条目会在 overlay 中作为独立文本区域显示，并可单独拖拽和缩放。
仅添加到当前监控区的文本区域
计数器同样全局唯一，只能属于一个监控区。
还没有任何自定义监控区。先点击上方“新建监控区”，再向其中添加 Buff 或计数器。
所有自定义监控区共用以下文字与进度条样式。

themes.general.backgroundImageDescriptio: Use a custom background image for all windows. Note: the background color must be semi-transparent for the image to show.
themes.general.classColorsDescription: Customize the colors used for each class in the live meter.
themes.general.classSpecIntro: Customize class or spec colors. Choose "Spec Colors" to show a specific color when a spec is detected.
themes.general.containFillColorDescripti: Background color used for the empty area when the image is fit using "Contain".
themes.general.customColorThemeDescripti: Customize each color variable, including transparency.
themes.general.customFontsDescription: Import custom fonts to replace the defaults. Supported font formats are .woff2, .woff, .ttf, and .otf.
themes.general.enableBackgroundImageDesc: Use an image as the background.
themes.general.enableCustomMonoDescripti: Use the custom font for numbers and code.
themes.general.enableCustomSansDescripti: Use the custom font for UI text.
themes.general.imageModeDescription: How the image should fit the window.
themes.general.showSkillTableHeaderDescr: Mostrar or hide the skill table column headers.
themes.general.specColorsDescription: Customize the colors used for each spec.
